decision-tree.root-question: Is the LLM judge gating any downstream action (production, training signal, dashboard alert)?

branch.question: Can at least 30 cases be hand-labelled within one calibration cycle?
Is the holdout independent from the judge prompt (no contamination)?

example.trace: judge gates jailbreak CI suite, 40 hand-labelled cases available, prompt independent of holdout → run-the-checklist
